title: False memories science
script_summary: Exploring the science behind false memories reveals surprising insights into our brain's function.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science really says about false memories.
False memories aren't just errors; they reveal how our brains construct reality.
In experiments, people recall events that never happened, and sometimes with vivid detail.
Studies show that our memories can be influenced by suggestions, making them unreliable.
This means our memories, which feel so real, can be fabrications crafted by our minds.
Want to dive deeper into your mind? Hit follow for more!
